Scenario: Verify migration completion email is sent to user
Steps:
1. Complete a migration
2. Check user email inbox
ExpectedResult: Email received with migration summary and status

Scenario: Verify backup completion email is sent to user
Steps:
1. Complete a backup run
2. Check user email inbox
ExpectedResult: Email received with backup summary and status

Scenario: Verify email sent when migration fails
Steps:
1. Trigger a failed migration
2. Check inbox
ExpectedResult: Failure notification email received with error details

Scenario: Verify email sent when backup fails
Steps:
1. Trigger a failed backup
2. Check inbox
ExpectedResult: Failure notification email received with error details

Scenario: Verify email not sent when notifications disabled
Steps:
1. Disable email notifications in settings
2. Complete a migration

Scenario: Verify email delivery within acceptable time (under 5 min)
Steps:
1. Complete a migration
2. Note exact completion time
3. Check when email arrives
ExpectedResult: Email arrives within 5 minutes of event

Scenario: Verify emails are not sent to deactivated users
Steps:
1. Deactivate a user
2. Run migration under their account
ExpectedResult: No email sent to deactivated user

Scenario: Verify user can enable email notifications
Steps:
1. Go to Notification Settings
2. Enable email notifications
3. Save
ExpectedResult: Setting saved — emails sent on next event

Scenario: Verify user can disable email notifications
Steps:
1. Go to Notification Settings
2. Disable email notifications
3. Save
ExpectedResult: Setting saved — no emails sent on next event

Scenario: Verify admin can configure SMTP settings
Steps:
1. Go to Admin > SMTP Settings
2. Enter host port username password
3. Save and test
ExpectedResult: Test email sent successfully with new SMTP config

Scenario: Verify notification type toggles work independently
Steps:
1. Enable only Backup notifications
2. Run migration and backup
ExpectedResult: Only backup notification sent — no migration email

Scenario: Verify migration email contains tester name and version
ExpectedResult: Email body includes tester email and version identifier

Scenario: Verify backup email contains source and target info
ExpectedResult: Email shows source type target type and file count

Scenario: Verify email links are clickable and lead to correct pages
Steps:
1. Open notification email
2. Click any links in the email
ExpectedResult: Links open correct pages in the application

Scenario: Verify email subject line clearly identifies the event type
Steps: 1. Check subject line of received notification
ExpectedResult: Subject clearly states event type (Migration Completed / Backup Failed etc)
